summary: Verified all 13 /api/v1/reports-advanced/* endpoints return 200 and AI token tracking is working. AI calls increment correctly on /api/v1/ai/guidance/generate and /api/v1/evfi-guided/session/start. Subscription page correctly displays AI calls usage.

minor.issue: AI usage tracked even when session creation fails (increments before session start). May be intentional design but worth reviewing.

critical_code_review_comments: reports_advanced.py: All 13 endpoints correctly use require_org_id(request) for tenant isolation
ai_guidance.py: Lines 193-198 correctly track AI usage AFTER successful guidance generation
ai_assistant.py: Lines 107-113 correctly track AI usage AFTER successful LLM response (not on error)
efi_guided.py: Lines 299-313 track usage BEFORE session creation - may want to move after success
SubscriptionManagement.jsx: Line 431 correctly displays limits.limits.ai_calls.current / limit
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo org data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 reports-advanced endpoints verified working (200). AI token tracking confirmed on ai/guidance/generate endpoint (increments from 3->4->5). Subscription page at /subscription correctly shows AI Calls: X / 100 with progress bar. Note: /api/v1/ai-assist/diagnose returns ai_enabled:false with placeholder key and does NOT increment usage (correct behavior).

subscription_page_ui.ai_calls_display: Shows '3 / 100' with progress bar and '97 calls remaining'
subscription_page_ui.other_limits_display: Invoices, Tickets, Vehicles, Team Members, Storage all showing correctly

mocked_apis_list: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is placeholder - ai_guidance uses pattern-based fallback so returns data
ai_assistant /diagnose returns error response with ai_enabled:false
